summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 (Enhanced User Collaboration) and P1 (Generative AI for Creative Assets). All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified via Playwright E2E tests.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Collaboration features fully implemented: WebSocket presence, activity feed, version history, comments
P1 AI Assets features fully implemented: text generation, color palette, layout suggestions, smart resize
AI text generation uses Gemini API with rule-based fallback if API unavailable
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testability
Comments system working with real-time updates via WebSocket
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_creative_studio_collab_ai.py - Created 16 tests for collaboration and AI assets APIs
seed_data_creation: Test comments created during testing via API and UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Collaboration and P1 AI Assets fully tested. Creative Editor accessible via /creative-studio -> Projects tab -> click project name. Collaborate button opens collab panel with Online/Comments/Versions/Activity tabs. AI Tools button opens AI Assistant panel with Text/Colors/Layouts/Resize tabs. AI text generation falls back to rule-based if Gemini API unavailable.

mocked_apis.note: AI text/palette generation uses Gemini API with rule-based fallback (not mocked)

backend_api_tests.POST /api/creative-studio/collab/comment: PASS - Creates comment and returns it

frontend_ui_tests.collaborate_button: PASS - data-testid=collab-toggle-btn visible and clickable in toolbar
frontend_ui_tests.online_tab: PASS - Shows 'You' user with green indicator
frontend_ui_tests.comments_tab: PASS - Shows comments list with Add comment input
frontend_ui_tests.add_comment: PASS - Comment added successfully, toast notification shown

backend_api_tests.POST /api/creative-studio/ai-assets/gene: PASS - Returns colors array with name/hex/usage

frontend_ui_tests.text_generation: PASS - Generated 5 headline options for 'music streaming platform'
frontend_ui_tests.palette_generation: PASS - Generated 5-color palette with names and hex codes
frontend_ui_tests.resize_tab: PASS - Shows platform checkboxes for smart resize
